tasks.build:all: deno task build:release && deno task build:ffi && deno task build:packages
tasks.build:packages: deno task build:npm:format && deno task build:wasm:deno && deno task build:npm:parse && deno task build:wasm:parse:deno && deno task build:npm:all && deno task build:wasm:all:deno
tasks.build:ffi:all: deno task build:ffi && deno task build:ffi:format && deno task build:ffi:parse
tasks.build:wasm:deno: deno run --allow-read --allow-env=TSV_BUILD_FORCE --allow-run=wasm-pack scripts/run_if_stale.ts --target crates/tsv_wasm/pkg/format/deno/tsv_wasm_bg.wasm -- wasm-pack build crates/tsv_wasm --target deno --release --out-dir pkg/format/deno -- --no-default-features --features format
tasks.build:wasm:parse:deno: deno run --allow-read --allow-env=TSV_BUILD_FORCE --allow-run=wasm-pack scripts/run_if_stale.ts --target crates/tsv_wasm/pkg/parse/deno/tsv_wasm_bg.wasm -- wasm-pack build crates/tsv_wasm --target deno --release --out-dir pkg/parse/deno -- --no-default-features --features parse
tasks.build:wasm:all:deno: deno run --allow-read --allow-env=TSV_BUILD_FORCE --allow-run=wasm-pack scripts/run_if_stale.ts --target crates/tsv_wasm/pkg/all/deno/tsv_wasm_bg.wasm -- wasm-pack build crates/tsv_wasm --target deno --release --out-dir pkg/all/deno
tasks.build:wasm:all:nodejs: deno run --allow-read --allow-env=TSV_BUILD_FORCE --allow-run=wasm-pack scripts/run_if_stale.ts --target crates/tsv_wasm/pkg/all/nodejs/tsv_wasm_bg.wasm -- wasm-pack build crates/tsv_wasm --target nodejs --release --out-dir pkg/all/nodejs
tasks.build:bench: deno task build:bench:deno && deno task build:bench:node
tasks.build:bench:deno: deno task build:ffi:all && deno task build:wasm:deno && deno task build:wasm:parse:deno && deno task build:wasm:all:deno
tasks.build:bench:node: deno task build:napi && deno task build:wasm:all:nodejs
tasks.build:npm:format: wasm-pack build crates/tsv_wasm --target web --release --out-dir pkg/format/npm -- --no-default-features --features format && deno run --allow-read --allow-write=crates/tsv_wasm/pkg --allow-run=gzip scripts/patch_npm_package.ts format
tasks.build:npm:parse: wasm-pack build crates/tsv_wasm --target web --release --out-dir pkg/parse/npm -- --no-default-features --features parse && deno run --allow-read --allow-write=crates/tsv_wasm/pkg --allow-run=gzip scripts/patch_npm_package.ts parse
tasks.build:npm:all: wasm-pack build crates/tsv_wasm --target web --release --out-dir pkg/all/npm && deno run --allow-read --allow-write=crates/tsv_wasm/pkg --allow-run=gzip scripts/patch_npm_package.ts all
tasks.dev: cargo watch -x 'check --workspace' -x 'test --workspace' || echo '⚠️  cargo-watch not installed. Run: cargo install cargo-watch'
tasks.check: cargo fmt --check && deno task pins:audit && deno task typecheck && deno task conformance:audit && deno task conformance:audit:compiler && deno task scan:audit && deno task fanout:audit && deno task roundtrip:audit && deno task canonicalize:audit && deno task binding:audit && deno task authoring:audit && deno task fuzz:audit && deno task test:deno && deno task test && deno task swallow:audit && deno task comments:audit && deno task gaps:audit && deno task check:ast-types && deno task lint
tasks.canonicalize:audit: cargo run -p tsv_debug --quiet canonicalize_audit tests/fixtures tests/fixtures_compile
tasks.swallow:audit: cargo test -p tsv_lang --features swallow_check --quiet && cargo run -p tsv_debug --features swallow_check --quiet swallow_audit
tasks.comments:audit: cargo test -p tsv_lang --features comment_check --quiet && cargo run -p tsv_debug --features comment_check --quiet comment_audit
tasks.gaps:audit: cargo run --profile corpus -p tsv_debug --features comment_check --quiet gap_audit
tasks.gaps:audit:update: cargo run --profile corpus -p tsv_debug --features comment_check --quiet gap_audit --update
tasks.bench: deno task bench:perf && deno task bench:harvest && deno task bench:conformance:run
tasks.bench:perf: deno task bench:harvest:svelte-styles && deno task bench:deno && deno task bench:node && deno task bench:bun:run && deno task bench:compose
tasks.bench:deno: deno task build:bench:deno && deno task bench:deno:run
tasks.bench:node: deno task build:bench:node && deno task bench:node:run
tasks.bench:bun: deno task build:bench:node && deno task bench:bun:run
tasks.bench:conformance: deno task bench:harvest && deno task build:bench:node && deno task bench:conformance:run
tasks.bench:harvest: deno task bench:harvest:wpt && deno task bench:harvest:test262 && deno task bench:harvest:svelte-rejects && deno task bench:harvest:svelte-styles
tasks.corpus:compare:format: deno task build:ffi:corpus && TSV_FFI_PROFILE=corpus deno task corpus:compare:format:run
tasks.corpus:compare:parse: deno task build:ffi:corpus && TSV_FFI_PROFILE=corpus deno task corpus:compare:parse:run
tasks.conformance:svelte-fixtures: deno task build:ffi:corpus && TSV_FFI_PROFILE=corpus deno task conformance:svelte-fixtures:run
tasks.conformance:ts-fixtures: deno task build:ffi:corpus && TSV_FFI_PROFILE=corpus deno task conformance:ts-fixtures:run
tasks.conformance:ts-repo: deno task build:ffi:corpus && TSV_FFI_PROFILE=corpus deno task conformance:ts-repo:run
tasks.conformance: deno task build:ffi:corpus && TSV_FFI_PROFILE=corpus PRETTIER_DEBUG=1 deno run --allow-ffi --allow-read --allow-env --allow-net --allow-sys --allow-write=benches/js/.cache benches/js/conformance.ts
tasks.conformance:all: deno task conformance:test262 && deno task conformance
tasks.test:npm: deno task build:npm:format && deno task test:npm:run
tasks.test:npm:parse: deno task build:npm:parse && deno task test:npm:parse:run
tasks.test:npm:all: deno task build:npm:all && deno task test:npm:all:run
tasks.test:napi: deno task build:napi && deno task test:napi:run
